summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of futuristic website with crazy innovative effects. All advanced features working perfectly including typewriter effect, morphing blob, magnetic buttons, animated counters, cursor glow, and holographic shine.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with all innovative effects (morphing blob, floating orbs, pulsing grid)
Typewriter effect cycles through phrases correctly ('Scale Without Limits.', 'Dominate Your Market.', etc.)
Animated stat counters work perfectly (500+, 8+, 100%) with smooth counting animation
Magnetic button effect works on hover (2 magnetic buttons found, transform changes detected)
Cursor glow follows mouse movement and activates correctly
Holographic shine effect works on solution cards (8 cards with shine elements)
Morphing gradient blob animation is active with blobMorph keyframes
Blog page loads correctly with proper dark theme and layout
Blog post page loads when clicking cards with proper content formatting
Navigation works smoothly (About, Solutions, Why Us sections with anchor scrolling)
Modal opens and closes correctly with all trigger buttons
Mobile responsive design works (nav toggle, mobile menu functionality)
All animations are smooth and performant
Premium Syne and Inter fonts loaded correctly
Vercel routing configuration working for blog pages
